problems_encountered.description: Mittwald API returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to create Redis database. Endpoint POST /v2/projects/{projectId}/redis-databases may not be available or Redis feature is not enabled for this server/account.

tool_response_summary: Tool invocation failed with HTTP 404 from Mittwald API. MCP tool correctly formatted the request with description and version parameters but upstream API endpoint returned Not Found.
execution_notes: Tool makes correct API call with parameters (description, version, projectId). Combined with 403 on versions endpoint and successful list operation, this suggests Redis functionality may be disabled or unavailable for this project's server.
